column3:
"Clove reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to lessen swelling and pain caused by inflammatory conditions, as it 
        contains active compounds that work on the affected area.
"Clove promotes weight loss" refers to its ability to enhance metabolism and help burn excess fats, potentially aiding in weight reduction.
"Clove helps detoxify the body" refers to its ability to cleanse and flush harmful impurities from the system, promoting overall health.
"Clove boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance body's defense mechanism against diseases and infections.

"Clove improves digestion" refers to its ability to aid in breaking down food, leading to better absorption and less 
         gastrointestinal discomforts during the process of digestion.
"Clove reduces blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to help lower high glucose levels in the body.
"Clove reduces cholesterol levels" refers to its ability to minimize LDL (bad) cholesterol and increase HDL (good) cholesterol, thus leading to improved cardiovascular health.
"Clove relieves muscle pain" refers to its ability to soothe sore or aching muscles due to its natural analgesic properties.
"Clove promotes healthy skin" refers to its ability to aid skin wellness due to its antioxidant properties that can reduce inflammation and protect against harmful elements.

"Clove supports heart health" refers to its potential role in enhancing cardiovascular well-being, mostly due to the presence of various active components like eugenol and antioxidants found in clove.
